meta.title: HelixMind — AI Coding CLI with Spiral Memory
meta.description: The only AI coding tool that remembers everything. Persistent spiral memory, 3D brain visualization, and intelligent context that grows with your project.

hero.title: Your AI thinks.
hero.subtitle: Three modes. one CLI. Jarvis plans autonomously, the Coding Agent builds with 22 tools, and the Security Monitor guards your project 24/7. All powered by spiral memory that never forgets.

problem.title: The problem with every AI coding tool
problem.subtitle: Every session starts from zero. Your AI forgets everything.

points.context: Lost context costs hours of debugging
points.patterns: Your coding patterns are never learned

spiral.title: Spiral Memory — Context that evolves
spiral.subtitle: Six levels of intelligent memory that grows, decays, and adapts with your project.

l1.name: Focus
l1.desc: Hot context. what you're working on right now

l2.name: Active
l2.desc: Recent patterns and decisions still in play

l6.name: Web Knowledge
l6.desc: Auto-fetched documentation and web insights, always up to date

modes.title: One tool. Three superpowers.
modes.subtitle: Switch between modes or let them run simultaneously. Each mode taps into the same spiral memory.

jarvis.title: Autonomous intelligence that thinks ahead
jarvis.desc: Jarvis runs in the background. planning, analyzing, and executing tasks from your queue. Multi-phase thinking cycles go from quick checks to deep reasoning. Proposals require your approval before any critical change.
jarvis.demo3: PROPOSAL: refactor | auth/login.ts needs error handling
jarvis.demo4: Rationale: 3 uncaught promise rejections in last session

agent.title: 22 tools. Terminal or browser. Ship faster.
agent.desc: Install the CLI and type `hx`. Or use the web console. Same 22 tools, same spiral memory, same power. The agent reads files, writes code, runs tests, and commits changes. Whether you live in your terminal or prefer a browser dashboard, HelixMind meets you where you work.

monitor.title: Autonomous guardian for your codebase
monitor.desc: Passive, defensive, or active. choose your protection level. The monitor scans for vulnerabilities, blocks threats, rotates exposed secrets, and alerts you with severity-ranked findings.
monitor.demo2: SQL injection risk in search handler
monitor.demo3: Missing CSRF token on form endpoint

brainShowcase.title: See your AI's knowledge — live
brainShowcase.subtitle: Each node is a piece of knowledge your AI has learned. Connections show how ideas relate. Interactive. zoom, pan, rotate.

webApp.title: Control everything from your browser
webApp.subtitle: Connect to your running CLI instances, manage brain visualizations, and monitor agents. all in a sleek web dashboard.

features.title: Built for developers who ship
features.subtitle: Everything you need to code faster with persistent AI context.

memory.title: Spiral Memory
memory.desc: 5-level memory system that evolves. Context promotes on use, decays when stale.
memory.modalDesc: A 5-level memory system inspired by how human memory works. Knowledge automatically promotes when referenced frequently and gracefully decays when no longer relevant.

brain.title: 3D Brain Visualization
brain.desc: See your AI's knowledge as a living 3D helix. Watch connections form in real-time.
brain.modalDesc: A real-time 3D helix visualization of your spiral memory. Watch nodes light up as knowledge flows between levels, with connections forming live as the AI works.

validation.title: Validation Matrix
validation.desc: 3-phase validation catches bugs before they exist. Static, dynamic, and knowledge checks.
validation.modalDesc: A 3-phase validation pipeline that classifies every task, applies static and dynamic checks, then validates against your spiral knowledge to catch issues before they reach production.

web.title: Web Knowledge Enricher
web.desc: Auto-fetches relevant documentation and stores it in your brain. Always up to date.
web.modalTitle: Web Knowledge. Always up to date
web.modalDesc: Automatically detects topics during conversation, searches the web for relevant documentation and best practices, then stores extracted knowledge in your spiral brain as L6 nodes.
capabilities: Explicit web_research tool for deep dives

offline.title: Fully Offline Capable
offline.desc: Run with Ollama locally. Your data never leaves your machine. Zero cloud dependency.
offline.modalTitle: Offline Mode. Your machine, your data
offline.modalDesc: Run HelixMind entirely on your local machine with Ollama. Auto-detects local models, pulls new ones on demand, and keeps every byte of your data private.

sessions.title: Multi-Session Agent
sessions.desc: Background security audits, parallel code analysis. Each with its own context.
sessions.modalDesc: Run multiple agent sessions simultaneously. Each session gets its own context, history, undo stack, and agent controller. Switch between sessions with keyboard shortcuts.

monitor.title: Security Monitor
monitor.desc: Autonomous system guardian. Detects threats, blocks attacks, and rotates secrets. passive, defensive, or active mode.
monitor.modalDesc: An autonomous security system that continuously monitors your project for threats. Three modes let you choose your protection level: passive observation, defensive blocking, or active response.

features.pageSubtitle: 22 tools, persistent memory, 3D visualization, multi-session agents, offline mode, and more.
features.modesSubtitle: HelixMind combines three distinct AI modes into a single tool.

checkpoints.title: Checkpoint System
checkpoints.desc: Auto-created at every tool call. Double-ESC to browse and revert to any previous state.

tools.title: 22 Agent Tools
tools.desc: Read, write, edit files, search, git, run commands, spiral memory, web research, browser automation.

mcp.title: MCP Server
mcp.desc: Works with Claude Code, Cursor, VS Code, Windsurf, Codex, JetBrains, and more.

search.title: Semantic Search
search.desc: Embedding-based KNN search across all spiral levels. Find concepts, not just keywords.

cli.title: Rich CLI
cli.desc: Figlet banners, syntax highlighting, animated status bar, slash commands, tab-based sessions.

permissions.title: Permission System
permissions.desc: 3-tier: auto, ask, dangerous. YOLO mode for the brave. Full control over what the agent can do.

jarvis.title: Jarvis
jarvis.desc: Autonomous assistant. Plans, analyzes, and executes tasks from a queue. Multi-phase thinking with approval workflow.

agent.title: Coding Agent
agent.desc: 22 tools for reading, writing, testing, and committing code. Terminal or browser. Persistent spiral memory.

monitor.title: Security Monitor
monitor.desc: Autonomous guardian. Scans for vulnerabilities, blocks threats, rotates secrets. Passive, defensive, or active.

comparison.title: How HelixMind compares
comparison.subtitle: The only tool with persistent, evolving memory.

pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free. Upgrade when you need Jarvis, cloud sync, and team features.

free.name: Open Source
free.desc: Full CLI agent, unlimited local use.

pro.name: Pro
pro.desc: Power-user with cloud sync and deep thinking.

openSource.label: Open Source
openSource.title: Built in the open. Free forever.
openSource.subtitle: HelixMind is fully open source under the AGPL-3.0 license. No black boxes, no vendor lock-in, no hidden costs for individual use.
openSource.licenseDesc: Full source code available. Audit, fork, contribute.
openSource.noLockInDesc: Bring your own API key. Switch LLM providers anytime.
openSource.communityDesc: Issues, PRs, and discussions welcome on GitHub.
openSource.selfHostDesc: Run everything on your own infrastructure. Your data stays yours.

cta.title: Start building with intelligence
cta.subtitle: Install HelixMind in 30 seconds. Jarvis, Coding Agent, and Security Monitor. free forever for individual use.

app.title: HelixMind App
app.noMessagesHint: Ask anything about your code, debug issues, or explore ideas.
app.setupDesc: The web app connects to your local HelixMind CLI agent. Follow these steps to get started.
app.setupStep1Desc: Install HelixMind globally on your machine or server via npm.
app.setupStep2Desc: Set your AI provider and API key. Supports Anthropic, OpenAI, Ollama (offline), Groq, DeepSeek, and more.
app.setupStep3Desc: Open a terminal in your project directory and launch the interactive agent.
app.setupStep4Desc: Creates .helixmind/ with a local spiral memory database and context.md for project-specific instructions.
app.setupStep5Desc: This app scans localhost automatically and connects to running CLI instances. Once connected, you can chat, run audits, and control agents from here.
app.notConnectedHint: Start HelixMind CLI locally or connect via relay to begin.
app.confirmDeleteDesc: This will permanently delete all messages in this chat.
app.notConnectedHintShort: Connect a CLI instance to send messages
app.consoleSelectSession: Select a session to view its output
app.consoleHint: Start Auto, Security, or Monitor via buttons or /auto, /security, /monitor commands.
app.monitorIdleHint: Start a monitor session with the button below or type /monitor in the chat.
app.brainstormHint: Chatting directly with AI. Connect a CLI instance for agent capabilities.
app.noInstances: No CLI instances found. Start HelixMind CLI locally.
app.skipPermissionsWarning: Tools will execute without confirmation. Use with caution.
app.bugNoBugsHint: Bugs are automatically detected from conversations.
app.bugConnectToFix: Connect a CLI instance to fix bugs
app.noCliFound: No CLI instances found. Start HelixMind CLI with: npx helixmind
app.chatTabHint: Send messages to your AI agent. Connect a CLI instance for full agent capabilities.
app.consoleTabHint: Terminal output of your running sessions. Start with /auto or /security.
app.monitorTabHint: Security dashboard for threats, defenses, and approvals.
app.jarvisIdleHint: Start the autonomous task daemon to process your task queue.
app.jarvisNoTasksHint: Add tasks via the form above or use /jarvis task in the CLI.
app.jarvisNoProposalsHint: Jarvis will generate proposals during thinking cycles.
app.helpCommands:
**Available commands:**
`/auto [goal]`. Start auto agent
`/security`. Run security audit
`/monitor [mode]`. Start security monitor
`/jarvis`. Switch to Jarvis tab
`/jarvis task "..."`. Add task
`/connect`. Connect to CLI instance
`/disconnect`. Disconnect CLI
`/console`. Switch to console tab
`/chat`. Switch to chat tab
`/brain`. Open 3D brain visualization
`/bugs`. Toggle bug journal
`/bugfix`. Fix all open bugs
`/stop [id]`. Stop sessions
`/help`. Show this help
app.consoleInfoDesc: Run automated code reviews, security audits, and background tasks. The Console displays terminal output from your AI agent sessions.
app.consoleInfoFeature1Desc: Automated code analysis. finds bugs, code smells, and suggests improvements across your entire project.
app.consoleInfoFeature2Desc: Scans for vulnerabilities, exposed secrets, unsafe dependencies, and security best practices.
app.consoleInfoFeature3Desc: Run any background task with full terminal output. Sessions continue while you work in other tabs.
app.monitorInfoDesc: Real-time security monitoring for your project. Detects threats, activates defenses, and requires approval for critical actions.
app.monitorInfoFeature1Desc: Watches for threats and reports them without taking action. Good for observing what happens.
app.monitorInfoFeature2Desc: Automatically blocks common threats and asks for approval on critical ones.
app.monitorInfoFeature3Desc: Aggressive threat response. automatically takes defensive action on all detected threats.
app.jarvisInfoDesc: Autonomous AI assistant that manages your task queue. Jarvis plans, executes, and learns from your project. working in the background while you focus on what matters.
app.jarvisInfoFeature1Desc: Add tasks with priorities. Jarvis picks them up, plans execution, and works through them autonomously.
app.jarvisInfoFeature2Desc: Multi-phase thinking cycles. quick checks, medium analysis, and deep reasoning for complex decisions.
app.jarvisInfoFeature3Desc: Parallel task execution with multiple workers. Proposals require your approval before critical changes.
app.consoleCompactHint: Start a session with the buttons below
app.monitorCompactHint: Start monitoring with the buttons below
app.jarvisCompactHint: Start Jarvis with the button below
app.quickAutoReviewDesc: Runs an AI-powered code review across your project. finds bugs, code smells, and suggests improvements
app.quickSecurityAuditDesc: Scans for vulnerabilities, exposed secrets, unsafe dependencies, and security best practices
app.quickMonitorDesc: Watches your project for file changes, errors, test failures, and code quality issues in real-time
app.switchToConsoleDesc: Open Console tab. view terminal output from background agent sessions
app.switchToMonitorDesc: Open Monitor tab. real-time security monitoring and threat detection
app.switchToJarvisDesc: Open Jarvis tab. autonomous task management and AI-driven execution

hero.title: Your models forget.
hero.subtitle: The missing memory layer for every AI. 6-level hierarchical memory that persists, evolves, and proactively delivers context your users need.
hero.trust: Trusted by developers building the future of AI

problem.label: The Problem
problem.title: Every AI session starts at zero
problem.subtitle: Without persistent memory, your AI wastes tokens, loses context, and frustrates users.

without.title: Without Memory
without.desc: Each session erases everything. Your model re-learns the same context repeatedly.

with.title: With HelixMind
with.desc: Context persists across sessions. Knowledge crystallizes over time.

items.quality: Lower output quality without project knowledge

solution.label: The Solution
solution.title: 6-Level Spiral Memory
solution.subtitle: Knowledge evolves through levels — from instant context to crystallized wisdom. Nothing is deleted, only refined.

l1.name: Focus
l1.desc: What you're working on right now. Seconds-old context, highest relevance.

l2.name: Active
l2.desc: Related files and dependencies. Hours of work, still connected.

l3.name: Reference
l3.desc: Architecture decisions, patterns, conventions. Proactively injected when relevant.

l4.name: Archive
l4.desc: Compressed summaries of older sessions. Accessible when needed.

l5.name: Deep Archive
l5.desc: Project DNA. Fundamental principles that define your codebase.

l6.name: Web Knowledge
l6.desc: Real-time external knowledge. Documentation fetched on demand.

solution.evolution: Knowledge automatically promotes on use, decays when stale
solution.notRag: This is not RAG. This is knowledge evolution.
solution.notRagDesc: RAG retrieves flat documents. Spiral Memory understands relationships, evolves relevance, and delivers context users didn't ask for but need.

modes.label: Three Modes
modes.title: Chat, Monitor, Auto
modes.subtitle: Three ways to leverage spiral memory. Each mode accesses the same persistent knowledge.

chat.title: Interactive Chat
chat.desc: Work with your AI — it already knows your project. Spiral delivers context automatically.

monitor.title: Security Monitor
monitor.desc: Autonomous guardian that scans for threats, watches for vulnerabilities, and learns your security patterns.

auto.title: Auto Mode
auto.desc: 10 parallel workers executing complex tasks. Background intelligence powered by spiral context.

why.label: Why Now
why.title: The memory gap is your opportunity
why.subtitle: 47 million developers use AI tools. Zero have persistent memory. First mover wins.

point1.title: Context windows are growing
point1.desc: But bigger context = more noise, not better signal

point2.title: "Lost in the Middle" problem
point2.desc: Models forget information in the middle of long contexts

point3.title: First memory architecture
point3.desc: HelixMind is the first production-ready memory layer

integration.label: Integration Paths
integration.title: Three ways to integrate
integration.subtitle: From MCP server to native feature — choose your integration depth.

native.title: Native Feature
native.desc: Embed the Spiral Engine directly into your model's context pipeline. Every user gets persistent memory out of the box.

mcp.title: MCP Server
mcp.desc: Ship the Spiral as a first-party MCP integration. Works with Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf, and more.

license.title: Technology License
license.desc: License the algorithms and architecture patterns. We bring 6 months of production-tuned relevance scoring.

integration.mcpLive: MCP Server already live and tested with Claude Code, Cursor, and Windsurf

roi.label: Provider ROI
roi.title: Why memory makes your product better
roi.subtitle: Persistent memory isn't just a feature — it's a competitive moat.

tokens.title: Lower Token Costs
tokens.desc: Spiral delivers 15-30K focused tokens instead of 120K flat context. 75% reduction in wasted tokens.

quality.title: Better Output Quality
quality.desc: Models with the right context produce better code. Less hallucination, more precision.

retention.title: User Retention
retention.desc: Memory creates switching costs. Users who leave lose their accumulated knowledge.

competitive.title: Competitive Edge
competitive.desc: First provider with native memory wins. Your competitors are already looking at this.

cost.title: Lower Compute Costs
cost.desc: Fewer tokens = less compute per query. Direct impact on your infrastructure bill.

comparison.title: Flat Context vs. Spiral Context
comparison.flatDesc: All context dumped into the model. Lost in the middle. Expensive.
comparison.spiralDesc: Focused, relevant, evolved. Delivers what's needed.
comparison.lost: Solves the "Lost in the Middle" problem by prioritizing relevant context

traction.label: Open Source
traction.title: Production-ready. Open source.
traction.subtitle: HelixMind is AGPL-3.0 licensed. No black boxes. Audit the code, fork it, contribute.

point2.title: Multi-provider support
point2.desc: Claude, GPT-4, Ollama, DeepSeek, Kimi, Groq

point3.title: Full feature set
point3.desc: 22 agent tools, 3D brain viz, validation matrix

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: These Terms of Service ("Terms") govern your use of the HelixMind platform, including the CLI tool, web dashboard, API, and all related services ("Services") provided by HelixMind ("we", "our", "us"). By accessing or using our Services, you agree to be bound by these Terms.

sections.heading: 1. Acceptance of Terms
sections.content: By creating an account, installing the CLI, or otherwise accessing our Services, you confirm that you are at least 16 years of age and agree to comply with these Terms. If you are using the Services on behalf of an organization, you represent that you have the authority to bind that organization to these Terms.

sections.heading: 2. Description of Services
items: An AI coding CLI tool with persistent spiral context memory
A web dashboard for account management, subscription billing, and support
API access for integration with third-party tools (on applicable plans)
Documentation, blog content, and community resources
sections.contentPost: We reserve the right to modify, suspend, or discontinue any part of the Services at any time with reasonable notice.

sections.heading: 3. Accounts
sections.contentPre: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activities that occur under your account. You agree to:
items: Provide accurate and complete registration information
Keep your password secure and not share it with others
Notify us immediately of any unauthorized access to your account
Not create multiple accounts to circumvent plan limitations
sections.contentPost: We may suspend or terminate accounts that violate these Terms or that show signs of fraudulent activity.

subSections.heading: 4.1 Free Tier
subSections.content: The HelixMind CLI is free and open source under the AGPL-3.0 license. No account or payment is required for local usage with your own API keys or local models (e.g., Ollama).

subSections.heading: 4.2 Paid Plans
subSections.content: Pro (19 EUR/month) and Team (39 EUR/user/month) plans are billed monthly or annually through Stripe. Enterprise plans are available with custom pricing upon request.

subSections.heading: 4.3 Billing
subSections.content: Subscriptions automatically renew at the end of each billing cycle unless cancelled. You may cancel your subscription at any time through the Stripe customer portal. Cancellation takes effect at the end of your current billing period.

subSections.heading: 4.4 Refunds
subSections.content: We generally do not offer refunds for partial billing periods. If you believe you have been incorrectly charged, contact us at legal@helixmind.dev within 14 days of the charge.

subSections.heading: 5.1 CLI Tool
subSections.content: The HelixMind CLI is licensed under the GNU Affero General Public License v3.0 (AGPL-3.0). You may use, modify, and redistribute the CLI in accordance with that license. The full license text is available in the project repository.

subSections.heading: 5.2 Web Platform
subSections.content: The HelixMind web platform, dashboard, API, and associated proprietary features are proprietary software. You are granted a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable license to use the web platform for its intended purpose during your active subscription.

subSections.heading: 5.3 Your Content
subSections.content: You retain ownership of all code, data, and content you create or store using HelixMind. We do not claim any intellectual property rights over your content. Spiral memory data stored locally on your machine remains entirely yours.

sections.heading: 6. Acceptable Use
sections.contentPre: You agree not to use the Services to:
items: Violate any applicable laws or regulations
Reverse engineer, decompile, or redistribute paid/proprietary features
Share API keys or account credentials with unauthorized parties
Attempt to gain unauthorized access to our systems or other users' accounts
Use the Services for automated scraping, spamming, or denial-of-service attacks
Interfere with or disrupt the integrity or performance of the Services

sections.heading: 7. Termination
sections.contentPre: You may terminate your account at any time through your dashboard settings. We may terminate or suspend your account if:
items: You violate these Terms or our Acceptable Use policy
Your account shows signs of fraudulent or illegal activity
We are required to do so by law
sections.contentPost: Upon termination, your right to access paid features ceases immediately. You may export your data before account deletion. We will retain billing records as required by law.

sections.heading: 8. Limitation of Liability
sections.content: To the maximum extent permitted by applicable law, HelixMind and its maintainers shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages, including but not limited to loss of profits, data, or business opportunities, arising from your use of or inability to use the Services. The Services are provided "as is" and "as available" without warranties of any kind, either express or implied, including but not limited to implied warranties of merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, and non-infringement. Our total liability to you for any claims arising from or related to these Terms or the Services shall not exceed the amount you paid us in the 12 months preceding the claim.

sections.heading: 9. Indemnification
sections.content: You agree to indemnify and hold harmless HelixMind and its maintainers from any claims, damages, losses, or expenses (including reasonable legal fees) arising from your use of the Services or violation of these Terms.

sections.heading: 10. Changes to These Terms
sections.content: We may update these Terms from time to time. Material changes will be communicated at least 30 days in advance via email or through a notice on our platform. Continued use of the Services after the effective date of changes constitutes acceptance of the updated Terms.

sections.heading: 11. Governing Law
sections.content: These Terms are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the Federal Republic of Germany, without regard to conflict of law provisions. Any disputes arising under these Terms shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts located in Germany.

sections.heading: 12. Contact
sections.contentPre: For questions about these Terms, contact us at:

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: HelixMind ("we", "our", "us") is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, store, and protect your personal data when you use our web platform and CLI tool, in accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and applicable data protection laws.

subSections.heading: 1.1 Account Data
subSections.contentPre: When you create an account on the HelixMind web platform, we collect the following information:
items: Email address
Name (if provided)
Profile information from OAuth providers (GitHub) if you choose to authenticate via third-party services

subSections.heading: 1.2 Payment Data
subSections.content: Payment information (credit card numbers, billing addresses) is processed exclusively by our payment provider, Stripe. We do not store your full credit card details on our servers. We retain only a reference ID, card brand, and last four digits for display purposes in your dashboard.

subSections.heading: 1.3 Usage Data
subSections.content: We collect anonymized usage data to improve our services, including API call counts, feature usage statistics, and error reports. This data does not contain personally identifiable information.

subSections.heading: 1.4 CLI Data
subSections.content: The HelixMind CLI tool stores all data locally on your machine by default. Spiral memory, project context, and configuration files remain on your local file system and are never transmitted to our servers unless you explicitly enable Cloud Brain Sync (available on Pro and Team plans).

subSections.heading: 1.5 Cookies
subSections.content: We use essential cookies required for authentication and session management. We do not use third-party tracking cookies or advertising cookies. If we introduce analytics in the future, we will update this policy and request your consent.

sections.heading: 2. How We Use Your Data
sections.contentPre: We process your personal data for the following purposes:
items: Providing and maintaining your account and access to our services
Processing subscription payments via Stripe
Sending transactional emails (account verification, password resets, billing notifications) via Resend
Providing customer support through our ticket system
Improving our services based on anonymized usage patterns
Ensuring platform security and preventing abuse
sections.legalBasis: We process your data based on contractual necessity (providing the service you signed up for), legitimate interest (improving our services and preventing abuse), and consent (where explicitly given).

sections.heading: 3. Data Storage and Security
sections.contentPre: Your account data is stored in a PostgreSQL database hosted on secure, encrypted infrastructure. We implement industry-standard security measures including:
items: Encryption at rest and in transit (TLS 1.3)
Secure password hashing (bcrypt)
JWT-based authentication with appropriate expiration
Regular security audits and dependency updates
sections.contentPost: Data is retained for as long as your account is active. Upon account deletion, your personal data is permanently removed within 30 days, except where retention is required by law (e.g., billing records for tax purposes).

sections.heading: 4. Third-Party Services
sections.contentPre: We share data with the following third-party processors, solely for the purposes described:
items: Stripe — Payment processing and subscription management
Resend — Transactional email delivery
GitHub — OAuth authentication (only if you choose GitHub login)
sections.contentPost: Each third-party processor operates under their own privacy policy and is bound by data processing agreements. We do not sell your personal data to any third party.

sections.heading: 5. Your Rights (GDPR)
sections.contentPre: Under the GDPR, you have the following rights regarding your personal data:
items: Right of Access — Request a copy of all personal data we hold about you
Right to Rectification — Request correction of inaccurate data
Right to Erasure — Request deletion of your personal data ("right to be forgotten")
Right to Restriction — Request limitation of data processing
Right to Data Portability — Receive your data in a structured, machine-readable format
Right to Object — Object to processing based on legitimate interest
Right to Withdraw Consent — Withdraw previously given consent at any time
sections.contentPost: You can exercise most of these rights directly through your dashboard settings (account export, account deletion). For other requests, please contact us at the address below.

sections.heading: 6. Data Transfers
sections.content: If your data is transferred outside the European Economic Area (EEA), we ensure appropriate safeguards are in place, such as Standard Contractual Clauses (SCCs) approved by the European Commission.

sections.heading: 7. Changes to This Policy
sections.content: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Material changes will be communicated via email or through a notice on our platform. The "Last updated" date at the top of this page indicates the most recent revision.

sections.heading: 8. Contact
sections.contentPre: For privacy inquiries, data access requests, or complaints, contact us at:
sections.contentPost: If you believe your data protection rights have been violated, you have the right to lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority in your EU member state of residence.

sections.content:

sections.heading: Responsible for content pursuant to § 55 para. 2 RStV
EU Dispute Resolution
sections.content: The European Commission provides a platform for online dispute resolution (ODR):
sections.contentPost: Our email address can be found above in the imprint. We are not willing or obliged to participate in dispute resolution proceedings before a consumer arbitration board.

sections.heading: Liability for Content
sections.content: As a service provider, we are responsible for our own content on these pages in accordance with general law pursuant to § 7 para. 1 TMG. According to §§ 8 to 10 TMG, however, we are not obligated as a service provider to monitor transmitted or stored third-party information or to investigate circumstances that indicate illegal activity.
sections.contentPost: Obligations to remove or block the use of information under general law remain unaffected. However, liability in this regard is only possible from the time of knowledge of a specific infringement. Upon becoming aware of such infringements, we will remove this content immediately.

sections.heading: Liability for Links
sections.content: Our website contains links to external websites of third parties, over whose content we have no influence. Therefore, we cannot assume any liability for this external content. The respective provider or operator of the linked pages is always responsible for the content of the linked pages. The linked pages were checked for possible legal violations at the time of linking. Illegal content was not recognizable at the time of linking.
sections.contentPost: A permanent content check of the linked pages is, however, not reasonable without concrete indications of an infringement. Upon becoming aware of infringements, we will remove such links immediately.

sections.heading: Copyright
sections.content: The content and works created by the site operators on these pages are subject to German copyright law. Reproduction, editing, distribution, and any kind of exploitation outside the limits of copyright law require the written consent of the respective author or creator. Downloads and copies of this page are only permitted for private, non-commercial use.
sections.contentPost: The HelixMind CLI software is published under the AGPL-3.0 license. The terms of use of the CLI software are governed by the provisions of this license.
